name: autonomous-builder
description: Design-first autonomous builder. A single orchestrator runs a design gate (the only pre-code approval), projects a plan from the approved design, then executes each task through a task-coordinator that owns an implementer -> tester -> reviewer inner loop with two independent retry budgets (implementation bounces and review bounces, 5 each). The implementer owns green tests; the tester inspects thoroughness and adds missing tests; the reviewer judges against the per-task ledger. A senior designer holds office hours for the task-coordinator and revises the design/plan on PLAN_WRONG. A researcher maintains a shared, list-based per-feature knowledge base (check-first, append-with-dedupe). At terminal states a reflector writes a developer-facing retrospective and a per-feature scorecard (no runtime memory layer). Built from the v2 design in plugins/autonomous-builder/docs/design-direction.md.
